ksa_text: Ability to develop, document, communicate, and iteratively update governance policies that reflect organizational objectives, regulatory requirements, and evolving AI capabilities.

dcwf.top_element_label: Interpret and apply applicable laws, statutes, and regulatory documents and integrate into policy.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Interpret and apply applicable laws, statutes, and regulatory documents and integrate into policy.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge case — excluded on balance: ability from AI Governance (affinity 0.72); insufficient RSK signal density (1 signal(s)) for AI Governance affinity 0.72. pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation confirms exclusion: 2 match(es) in RSK job postings or certification curricula. A gap here would not be noticeable to a working AI Test and Evaluation Specialist.
